tabs.headline: Creative Pipeline
tabs.body: Document → Mockup → Image → Blog. A white paper gets AI-summarized, annotated, then AI generates a hero image. The blog post embeds all of it.
tabs.footerNote: 🤖 AI summarizes → AI generates → AI parses

tabs.headline: Cross-Org Commerce
tabs.body: Invoice → Adoption → Payment → Settlement. Vendor's AI drafts invoice, Client's AI validates against budget, auto-reconciles both ledgers.
tabs.footerNote: 🤖 Sender AI drafts → Recipient AI validates

tabs.headline: Product Lifecycle
tabs.body: Product → Store → Proposal → PO. AI generates descriptions, buyer's AI compares specs, seller's AI drafts proposals, procurement AI validates.
tabs.footerNote: 🤖 Full lineage: every AI traces provenance

attributes.headline: Software that behaves like media.
attributes.subheadline: Every Card is a file AI can attach, inspect, and transform, just like you attach a JPG to an email. Cards carry their own meaning wherever they go.
